name: standards-conformance report includes a generated-at timestamp at the top of the document
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/conformance-report.sh" --out STANDARDS-CONFORMANCE.md --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && head -10 STANDARDS-CONFORMANCE.md | grep -q 'generated_at: 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z' && echo ok 1>&2
